channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: Getting Ready for Festival Season? Laufey & Etsy Are Here to Help With an Exclusive Collection of ‘A Matter of Time’ Themed Goodies
item.description:
[Intro music plays]
Host: "Welcome to Trending on Billboard, your go-to source for the latest music news and must-have merchandise. I'm your host, and today we're talking about festival season and the perfect way to get ready for it: with Laufey's new collection on Etsy.
[Music transitions to a upbeat, festival-inspired tune]
Host: "Laufey has partnered with Etsy to introduce a collection inspired by her third studio album, featuring custom pieces made with independent Etsy sellers and a curated selection of items she handpicked. From beaded accessories to trucker hats, and even a vintage watch edit, there's something for every festival-goer.
[Sound effects: Festival crowd cheers]
Host: "We're highlighting some of our favorite pieces from the collection, like the limited-edition Laufey Collection Forget-Me-Not Journal, perfect for jotting down memories from the festival or just for everyday use. This 5x8.25-inch journal features 48 pages and a beautifully embossed exterior with pressed forget-me-not flowers, symbolizing love and constancy.
[Sound effects: Page turning]
Host: "Another standout piece is the Laufey Collection Crochet Scarf, made from soft angora wool and available in a light blue color. You can wear it wrapped around your neck or on top of your head for a stylish and cozy look.
[Music transitions back to the intro tune]
Host: "With over 331 items to choose from, you're sure to find the perfect addition to your festival outfit. And as a reminder, these pieces are limited, so act fast if you want to get your hands on them. You can shop the full collection on Etsy's website.
[Outro music plays]
Host: "Thanks for tuning in to Trending on Billboard. Don't forget to check out Laufey's collection on Etsy and get festival ready the Laufey way. See you next time!"
